title: DualFusion's Chair Mod
description:
Using wood types it adds furniture (ONE SINGULAR CHAIR) to Minecraft.
(Part of DualFusion's "Mini-Mod" project)
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bf4105c8ab34a8d5e21f2126205967f9200098_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1207)

**This is a DualFusion "Mini-Mod" which is a part of a small DualFusion project where we would release or update a small mod each month.**

using all wood types to add furnitre to minecraft 
in the future we plan to add stuff like using wood and other things but our main goal for the first 2 versions is to add all wood types

Chairs:
All wood types

Tables:
All wood types
